TextView.android:text: PASSIONATE ANDROID DEVELOPER WITH A FOCUS ON CLEAN ARCHITECTURE, RESTFUL API INTEGRATION, AND HIGH-IMPACT USER EXPERIENCES.
Passionate Android Developer with expertise in Java and XML. Experienced in crafting clean, intuitive, and user-friendly UI/UX layouts with
Take a look at my recent { projects }

My schooling at Sengunthar Vidhyalaya laid the foundation of my academic journey. The school provided excellent guidance in Mathematics and Science, helping me develop strong logical thinking and problem-solving skills from an early age.
Active participant in school science and cultural events

During my higher secondary education at Nandha Matric Hr. Sec. School, I pursued Computer Science as my major subject. This phase introduced me to programming fundamentals, database concepts, and the world of software, which inspired me to pursue engineering in Computer Science.
Participated in inter-school technical and cultural competitions

My engineering journey at Nandha Engineering College was transformative. I deepened my knowledge in Data Structures, DBMS, Software Engineering, and Android Development. During this period I built multiple Java-based Android applications, including this portfolio app as my final year project. College life also sharpened my teamwork and problem-solving abilities.
Built portfolio Android app as final year project
Participated in national-level project showcase events

Worked as a Customer Executive at Cogent in Bengaluru for 11 months. This role involved handling customer queries, resolving issues efficiently, and delivering exceptional service. The BPO experience sharpened my communication skills, patience, and ability to work under pressure in a fast-paced professional environment.
Developed excellent verbal and written communication skills by interacting with customers daily
Enhanced problem-solving ability by handling escalations and resolving customer issues in real time
Gained strong team collaboration and professional work culture experience in a corporate setting
Improved time management and multitasking by handling multiple customer accounts simultaneously
Built resilience and a positive attitude towards challenging work environments and deadlines
In case of any queries you can send your queries with the below mentioned details!
